// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.consumer.x;

// JV008 positive on a tier-2 declared reporter: the sink is recognized by the
// (package, Class, method) declaration (same-package bare qualifier), and a
// secret-named argument still leaks. Origin, not name - InternalLog.other would
// not be a sink.
class Jv008Tier2Secret {
    void reporterLeaksSecret(String password) {
        InternalLog.logInternal("write record", password); // want "JV008.*password"
    }
}
